_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in detecting host and network based intrusions via intrusion detection technologies.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.460), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.437).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.596). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [based, detecting, detection, host, intrusion, intrusions] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.879, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.5%). "Skill in detecting host and network based intrusions via intrusion detection tec" and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.497 < STS 0.596 (gap -0.099). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [based, detecting, detection] and [ai, architecture, assessments] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [based, detecting, detection, host, intrusion, intrusions]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
